dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: Your streets shall once again run red. with your blood.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest on an unprecedented scale.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Menendez is a terrorist.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: We're bringing peace and security to the world.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 4
dialogue_segments.text: He refuses to let me go.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 5
dialogue_segments.text: Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 5
dialogue_segments.text: A lot of people counting on us for answers.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 6
dialogue_segments.text: Specter one, report.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 7
dialogue_segments.text: Need a sitrep.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 4
dialogue_segments.text: This isn't real. The hell it is.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 8
dialogue_segments.text: Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 9
dialogue_segments.text: Pull it together, man!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 10
dialogue_segments.text: So eager to leave, that is. Killing men is is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 11
dialogue_segments.text: You were never cut out to be a Mason.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 12
dialogue_segments.text: No more games. This ends now.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 13
dialogue_segments.text: Get the Reznov challenge pack. And you pre-order now.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 8
dialogue_segments.text: Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 9
dialogue_segments.text: Pull it together, man!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 10
dialogue_segments.text: So eager to leave, that is. Killing men is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 11
dialogue_segments.text: You were never cut out to be a Mason.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 12
dialogue_segments.text: No more games. This ends now.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 13
dialogue_segments.text: Get the Reznov challenge pack.

Voice separation reminders:
- speaker_id continuity is acoustic, not semantic. A speaker naming another person is not evidence they are that person.
- Before reusing any prior speaker_id, compare the audible match across vocal timbre, age impression, gender presentation, accent/dialect impression, delivery mode, and recording texture. If those cues do not clearly line up, create a new speaker_id.
- Do not merge narration/figurehead VO, antagonist taunts, female radio/comms, gruff soldier responses, and promo-announcer copy unless the voice itself clearly matches.
- Default official/public-address/newsreel/expository narration to a distinct speaker_id from villain threats unless the acoustic match is very strong.
- If delivery shifts from direct character/threat speech into official public-address, newsreel, briefing, or expository narration, prefer a new speaker_id unless the exact same voice clearly continues.
- If this chunk creates a new official/public-address/newsreel/expository speaker_id, keep the immediately adjacent follow-on official line on that same speaker_id unless strong acoustic evidence indicates another change.
- If adjacent words are one uninterrupted utterance from the same voice, keep them together instead of splitting them into artificial fragments.
- The handoff is reference-only memory. Never copy or continue prior lines unless they are audibly present in THIS chunk.
- If the current chunk only contains one audible promo/narration line, return only that line; do not invent follow-up tactical chatter from prior chunks.

Recent dialogue tail (reference only, not transcript continuation):

- Speaker 13 (spk_013): Get the Reznov challenge pack.
